footer.description: Leading ecopark in adventure and ecotourism in the Mayan Jungle. Committed to safety and the preservation of our natural environment.
footer.newsletter_desc: Subscribe to receive exclusive offers and adventure news.
footer.copyright: © 2026 EXTREME ADVENTURING CANCÚN. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.

history.subtitle: Our History
history.title: MORE THAN ADVENTURE, A LEGACY IN THE JUNGLE.
history.p1: Extreme Adventuring Cancún was founded with a single purpose: to offer visitors a safe, natural, and unforgettable adventure inspired by the Mayan jungle.
history.p2: For almost two decades, we have designed experiences that combine ecotourism, entertainment, culture, and family adventure, always prioritizing safety, environmental respect, and the preservation of the Mayan Jungle.

projects_section.subtitle: Our Projects
projects_section.title: THE THRILL YOU'RE LOOKING FOR.
projects_section.description: Each of our developments in Puerto Morelos, Mexico City, and the State of Mexico has been designed to offer a unique experience, combining comfort, style, and functionality.

upcoming.title: NEW EXPERIENCES
upcoming.description: Our team is exploring the Mayan jungle to bring you even more extreme and immersive adventures. Get ready for the unexpected.

items.text: An immersive jungle experience that redefines the connection with nature and local culture.
items.author: National Geographic Explorer

items.text: The level of safety, facilities, and staff attention make it the best park in the area.
items.author: TripAdvisor Traveler's Choice

items.text: Pure adrenaline combined with a deep respect for sacred cenotes. Unforgettable.
items.author: Aventurero Magazine

cta.title: READY FOR YOUR NEXT ADVENTURE?
cta.description: Let's talk about your next great experience. Our team of experts is ready to design an adventure tailored to you.

editorial.subtitle: Our History
editorial.title: 18 YEARS OF LEGACY.
editorial.p1: Extreme Adventuring Cancun started as a small project to support the local community after port closures. Today, we are the leading adventure ecopark on the iconic Ruta de los Cenotes in Puerto Morelos.
editorial.p2: We are a 100% Mexican company. For almost two decades, we have designed experiences that fusion ecotourism, culture, and family adventure, always prioritizing safety and the preservation of the Mayan Jungle.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide every visitor with a safe, natural, and unforgettable adventure inspired by the majesty of the Mayan jungle.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the leading global ecopark, fusioning ecotourism, culture, and family entertainment, with absolute respect for the environment.

philosophy.subtitle: Our Evolution
philosophy.title: MORE THAN A TOUR
philosophy.description: What began with a single tour has transformed into a comprehensive Ecopark based on trust, innovation, and warm hospitality.

cards.title: Extreme Adventure
cards.text: Full ATV circuits, multiple zip-line towers, and equestrian trails that cross the vastness of the jungle.

cards.title: Water World
cards.text: Exploration of majestic open cenotes and guided snorkeling experiences in the most protected marine areas.

cards.title: Cultural Heritage
cards.text: Immersion in traditions with Mayan stories, authentic gastronomy, and tequila tasting with regional heritage.

contact.subtitle: Connect with us
contact.title: YOUR NEXT ADVENTURE STARTS HERE
contact.description: Ready to live the Extreme experience? Contact us for personalized bookings, corporate events, or any questions you may have.

projects.subtitle: Our Projects
projects.title: UNFORGETTABLE EXPERIENCES
projects.description: Discover our curated collection of adventures. Each experience is designed with the highest standards of safety and exclusivity.

projects_data.name: Extreme Adventuring
projects_data.description: An unforgettable experience of pure adrenaline in the Mayan jungle with zip-lines, professional ATV circuits, and exploration of hidden cenotes in virgin nature.

projects_data.name: Snorkeling Adventure
projects_data.description: Explore the majestic coral reef. Dive and swim alongside sea turtles, stingrays, and hundreds of tropical fish in their natural habitat.

projects_data.name: Cenote Adventuring
projects_data.description: Dive into the crystal-clear and healing waters of our exclusive cenotes. A mystical, refreshing adventure connected with Mayan culture.

projects_data.name: Beach Taco Tour
projects_data.description: An exceptional gastronomic and cultural tour. Taste the best local tacos with fresh ingredients while enjoying panoramic views of the Caribbean Sea.

projects_data.name: Horse Ride
projects_data.description: Ride through dense jungle trails of rich vegetation and amazing landscapes in this peaceful and memorable equestrian adventure.
